initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_no_content_warning
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
WHERE legalities.format = 'commander' AND legalities.status = 'Legal';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_no_content_warning
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
WHERE legalities.format = 'commander' AND legalities.status = 'Legal';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_no_content_warning
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
WHERE legalities.format = 'commander' 
  AND legalities.status = 'Legal';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_without_content_warning
FROM 
    legalities
JOIN 
    cards ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
WHERE 
    legalities.format = 'commander' 
    AND legalities.status = 'Legal';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN cards.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_without_content_warning
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
WHERE legalities.format = 'commander' 
  AND legalities.status = 'Legal';
